source.title: Star Atlas Weekly News Recap #63
source.author: Intergalactic Herald
source.classification_rationale: Weekly newsletter/recap aggregates developments and linked sources.

summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. PockThePirate posted a video of the Showroom details from the Star Atlas
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
Star Atlas Townhall Announced and Game Mechanics
PockThePirate posted a video about the upcoming Star Atlas Townhall.
Star Atlas Never Alone Escape Velocity Town Hall News
Beyond The Horizon posted a video about the upcoming Star Atlas Townhall.
Star Atlas Town Hall #39 Showroom, SAGE, and DAO Updates
Metaverse Nomads posted a video of the Star Atlas Townhall.
STAR ATLAS Showroom 2.1 On June 1st!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video recap of the Star Atlas Townhall.
Star Atlas Town Hall 39 Recap — Massive Gameplay Updates
The Hologram published an article about the Star Atlas Townhall.
Star Atlas Unreal Engine 5 Gameplay in 4k!!
Beyond The Horizon posted a video of the videos from the Townhall.
Star Atlas Townhall : Showroom 2.1 every detail you could possibly want
PockThePirate posted a video of the Showroom details from the Star Atlas Townhall.
Metaverse Nomads #96 Star Atlas Showroom 2.1 @ June 1st
Metaverse Nomads posted the video of their weekly Star Atlas live stream.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #81
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
Wake UP!!! A.I. & Web3
Gladiator posted a video of his reactions to the Star Atlas Townhall.
Star Atlas Townhall : SAGE mining and Crafting
PockThePirate posted a video about the SAGE mining and crafting updates.
Star Atlas : DAO release Basics
PockThePirate posted a video about the DAO updates.
STAR ATLAS #182 Surge Event & Ship Winner!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of Star Atlas updates.
Star Atlas Ships – Introducing the Pearce X6
Star Atlas posted a video highlighting the Pearce X6 ship.
Start Your Engines: Star Atlas Showroom 2.1 Game Release Begins the Racing Season
Star Atlas published an article about the Showroom 2.1 game release.
Star Atlas – Showroom R2.1 Trailer
Star Atlas posted a video of the the Showroom R2.1 trailer.
STAR ATLAS Gameplay – Showroom 2.1 (Experimental Build)
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of gameplay in the Star Atlas Showroom 2.1.
STAR ATLAS SHOWROOM 2.1 – Let’s Take a Look!
The Club posted of video going through the Star Atlas Showroom 2.1.
